note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

juvenile.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

location_town.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

at_1.guidance: A wall-clock time (e.g. 10:00). If the form pre-prints AM/PM, circle/strike the correct one by hand — the engine does not.

am.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

pm_because.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

at_2.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

at_3.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

at_4.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

the_state.guidance: A US state — 'Maine' or the 2-letter 'ME'; match the box width.
